site.plus_half_requires: Remove public source-library payloads from preview responses and add authenticated end-to-end coverage for the gated reader flow.
Back free-account entitlements with durable server-side access rules for citations, source-library responses, and future premium tiers.
Reduce the main vendor bundle and tighten 390px navigation density without diluting the editorial hierarchy.

growth.plus_half_requires: Replace queue-only capture with portal-backed HubSpot forms, double opt-in, and workflow-level segmentation.
Connect Search Console and add structured data coverage for remaining non-chapter editorial pages.
Verify GA4 custom dimensions in production and map HubSpot lifecycle stages to a live conversion dashboard.
Add thank-you landing pages and campaign-level attribution on donation and recurring-support returns.
Finish entitlement-copy alignment across every landing page and send new signups directly into the gated reading flow.
